name: DoIP_ConfigureRoutingActivationRequest
title: DoIP_ConfigureRoutingActivationRequest
syntax: void DoIP_ConfigureRoutingActivationRequest(long mode, dword activationType, dword valueReserved);
description: Configures the Routing Activation Request Message sent by a tester.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: 0: Do not send a routing activation type1: Send 1 byte activation type, value must be <= 0xFF (default)2: Send 2 byte activation type, value must be <= 0xFFFF

parameters.name: activationType
parameters.description: The value to send if an activation type is configured (i.e. mode is equal to 1 or 2).

parameters.name: valueReserved
parameters.description: The value of the reserved field in the message.

description: You can also configure these values in the DoIP.INI file.
example.code:
// Send the 2 byte activation type 0x1234, and set the reserved field
DoIP_ConfigureRoutingActivationRequest( 2, 0x1234, 0x76543210);

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
